song.title: Trading My Sorrows
song.author: Darrell Evans
song.presentation: V1 V2 C V1 V2 C B C E
song.lyrics:
[V1] . G C2 Em D 1) I’m trading my sorrows! .G C2 Em D I’m trading my shame! .G C2 Em I’m laying them down . D G C2 Em D For the joy of the Lord!
[V2] 2) I’m trading my sickness! I’m trading my pain! I’m laying them down For the joy of the Lord!
[C] Chorus . G C2 Em D We say,| "Yes, Lord, yes, Lord, yes, yes, Lord! Yes, Lord, yes, Lord, yes, yes, Lord! Yes, Lord, yes, Lord, yes, yes, Lord! Amen!"
[B] Bridge . G C2 I am pressed but not crushed, . Em D Persecuted, not abandoned, .G C2 Em D Struck down but not destroyed. . G C2 I am blessed beyond the curse, . Em D For His promise will endure; . G C2 Em D ‘Cause His joy’s gonna be my strength!|| .D G D Though the sorrow may last for the night, .F C His joy comes with the morning!
[E] 1) I’m trading my sorrows! I’m trading my shame! I’m laying them down For the joy of the Lord! 2) I’m trading my sickness! I’m trading my pain! I’m laying them down For the joy of the Lord! Chorus We say,| "Yes, Lord, yes, Lord, yes, yes, Lord! Yes, Lord, yes, Lord, yes, yes, Lord! Yes, Lord, yes, Lord, yes, yes, Lord! Amen!" Bridge I am pressed but not crushed, Persecuted, not abandoned, Struck down but not destroyed. I am blessed beyond the curse, For His promise will endure; ‘Cause His joy’s gonna be my strength! Though the sorrow may last for the night, His joy comes with the morning!
